## Testing performed
- [ ] `npm run build` completes clean
- [ ] `npm run dev` launches and the affected feature works
- [ ] If this PR adds a fix: preview + apply + undo all tested manually
- [ ] If this PR modifies the live optimizer: tested service-recovery on next launch after a force-kill

## Risk
- [ ] Low — UI / docs / data-only change
- [ ] Medium — touches scan engine / rules / fixes preview
- [ ] High — touches fix engine apply path, registry writes, or service stop/start
